summary: TWO_COLUMN Hölder inequality. LEFT axes with BLUE x bars fixed + ORANGE y bars rotated in 4 pair-blocks by ValueTracker θ_tr ∈ [0, 2π]. RIGHT shows live p, q=p/(p-1), <x,y>, ‖x‖_p, ‖y‖_q, their product, and the gap = RHS−|LHS| (always ≥0). Phase 2 morphs p via ValueTracker p_tr through 1.5, 4, 2.5, 2.
